things.name: Museum of Islamic Art
things.description: I.M. Pei's masterpiece on an island in Doha Bay housing the world's finest Islamic art collection

things.name: Souq Waqif
things.description: Restored 19th-century market with falcons, spices, Arabic coffee and traditional restaurants

things.name: The Pearl-Qatar
things.description: Artificial island with luxury marinas, restaurants and yacht-lined promenade

things.name: Corniche Promenade
things.description: 7km waterfront promenade with the Doha skyline backdrop and traditional dhow harbour

things.name: National Museum of Qatar
things.description: Jean Nouvel's desert rose-shaped museum telling the story of Qatar's land, sea and people

things.name: Katara Cultural Village
things.description: Cultural complex with amphitheatre, galleries, restaurants and the Katara beach

things.name: Al Zubarah Fort & Archaeological Site
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 18th-century pearl fishing town on the north coast

things.name: Inland Sea (Khor Al Udeid)
things.description: Spectacular tidal inlet surrounded by sand dunes accessible by 4WD desert safari

things.name: MIA Park & Dhow Harbour
things.description: Green park beside the Museum of Islamic Art with traditional Qatari dhow boats

things.name: Aspire Zone & Torch Tower
things.description: Olympic sports complex from the 2006 Asian Games with the distinctive flame-topped tower
